ast.name: error
ast.source: Error: Waypoint bounds not found, unable to continue.
ast.target: 错误：未找到航点边界，无法继续。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Error: Waypoint flag must be surrounded by double-percent signs.
ast.target: 错误：航点标记必须用双百分号包围。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Error: Landmark flag must be surrounded by double-percent signs.
ast.target: 错误：地标标记必须用双百分号包围。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the style of folder note used.
ast.target: 选择使用的文件夹笔记样式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, folder notes will be listed alongside other notes in the generated waypoints.
ast.target: 启用后，文件夹笔记将与其他笔记一起列在生成的路径点中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, non-Markdown files will be listed alongside other notes in the generated waypoints.
ast.target: 启用后，非 Markdown 文件将与其他笔记一起列在生成的路径点中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the name of the folder note containing the waypoint will be listed at the top of the generated waypoints.
ast.target: 启用后，包含该路径点的文件夹笔记名称将显示在生成的路径点顶部。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, folders will be listed at the top in the generated waypoints.
ast.target: 启用后，文件夹将在生成的路径点顶部列出。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the waypoint generator will stop scanning nested folders when it encounters a folder note. Otherwise, it will only stop if the folder note contains a waypoint.
ast.target: 启用后，路径点生成器在遇到文件夹笔记时将停止扫描嵌套文件夹。否则，只有当文件夹笔记包含路径点时才会停止。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, links will be generated like [[My Page]] instead of [My Page](../Folder/My%Page.md).
ast.target: 启用后，链接将生成如下形式 [[My Page]]，而不是 [My Page](../Folder/My%Page.md)。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, links will use the "title" frontmatter property for the displayed text (if it exists).
ast.target: 启用后，链接将使用前置元数据中的“title”属性作为显示文本（如果存在）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the waypoint list will be indented with spaces rather than with tabs.
ast.target: 启用后，路径点列表将使用空格而不是制表符缩进。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If spaces are used for indentation, this is the number of spaces that will be used per indentation level.
ast.target: 如果使用空格缩进，这是每个缩进层级使用的空格数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Text flag that triggers waypoint generation in a folder note. Must be surrounded by double-percent signs.
ast.target: 在文件夹笔记中触发航点生成的文本标志。必须用双百分号包围。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Text flag that triggers landmark generation in a folder note. Must be surrounded by double-percent signs.
ast.target: 在文件夹笔记中触发地标生成的文本标志。必须用双百分号包围。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Regex list of files or folders to ignore while making indices. Enter only one regex per line.
ast.target: 生成索引时要忽略的文件或文件夹的正则表达式列表。每行仅输入一个正则。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The filename of the folder note. Only used if the folder note style is set to Custom Filename.
ast.target: 文件夹笔记的文件名。仅当文件夹笔记样式设置为自定义文件名时使用。
